steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between two authors. The notes show both Jean Toomer and Herman Melville share one key fact: works by each recently entered the public domain.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'unlike': Uses contrasting language — highlights a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice B — 'novel vs. novella': Distinguishes the two authors by genre — a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — 'one author only': Discusses only one author, so no comparison is made. ✗
  • Choice D — 'authors whose works recently entered the public domain': Identifies the shared characteristic and applies it to both authors. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
